note: Direct support-automation case studies should keep customer support elevated even if jobs evidence is secondary.

items.title: Decagon and OpenAI deliver high-performance, fully automated customer support at scale
items.summaryEn: OpenAI describes Decagon automating customer support conversations at scale without human intervention.
items.inferenceSummaryEn: This official case study points to direct automation of frontline customer support work.

items.title: Zendesk unveils AI-powered CX platform with sophisticated agents and intelligent copilots
items.summaryEn: Zendesk expands AI agents and copilots to automate more support interactions and case resolution.
items.inferenceSummaryEn: The media report reinforces direct customer support automation pressure.

items.title: Support Operations Manager | OpenAI
items.summaryEn: The posting emphasizes building automation systems and agentic workflows to scale support quality.
items.inferenceSummaryEn: The job posting supports the broader shift toward automated support operations.

note: Finance automation and AI bookkeeping signals should keep bookkeeping risk clearly above midpoint.

items.title: Put AI to work: Automate and Scale Financial Operations
items.summaryEn: OpenAI highlights automating reconciliation, closing, and finance back-office work with AI.
items.inferenceSummaryEn: The official workflow story directly targets repetitive bookkeeping tasks.

items.title: Basis scales accounting by turning OpenAI model progress into trusted agents
items.summaryEn: OpenAI says Basis uses AI agents to automate reconciliations, journal entries, and financial summaries in accounting firms.
items.inferenceSummaryEn: This case study reinforces automation pressure on bookkeeping and close work.

items.title: Docyt AI Unveils GARY, the World's First AI Bookkeeper
items.summaryEn: Docyt says its AI bookkeeper automates manual bookkeeping and continuous reconciliation.
items.inferenceSummaryEn: The article explicitly describes AI taking over bookkeeping tasks.

note: Broad AI strategy news without physical-maintenance evidence should not meaningfully spike this role.

items.title: One in a million: celebrating the customers shaping AI's future
items.summaryEn: OpenAI summarizes broad customer AI adoption across writing, coding, research, and analytics.
items.inferenceSummaryEn: This is broad adoption context rather than evidence about physical maintenance work.

items.title: Measuring AI agent autonomy in practice
items.summaryEn: Anthropic analyzes agent autonomy across many domains, from email triage to cyber operations.
items.inferenceSummaryEn: Cross-domain agent research does not directly change industrial maintenance tasks.
